title: First Driving Lesson
scene: 你第一次上驾校练车，教练在副驾驶。

turns.cn: 先调座椅和后视镜，系安全带。
turns.en: Adjust your seat and mirrors first. Buckle up.

turns.cn: 好了，现在可以启动吗？
turns.en: All set. Can I start the engine now?

turns.cn: 轻踩刹车，挂D档，慢慢松刹车。
turns.en: Press the brake lightly, shift to drive, and ease off the brake slowly.

turns.cn: 速度多快合适？
turns.en: How fast should I go?

turns.cn: 停车场里十五迈以内，看两边。
turns.en: Under fifteen in the lot. Watch both sides.

turns.cn: 转弯前要打灯对吧？
turns.en: I should signal before turning, right?

turns.cn: 对，提前三十英尺打转向灯。
turns.en: Yes. Signal at least thirty feet before you turn.

title: Parallel Parking
scene: 教练教你练习侧方停车。

turns.cn: 侧方停车是路考重点，慢慢来。
turns.en: Parallel parking is a big part of the road test. Take your time.

turns.cn: 我先打右灯靠边？
turns.en: Should I signal right and pull alongside first?

turns.cn: 对，倒车时看后视镜和右肩盲点。
turns.en: Yes. When backing up, check your mirror and blind spot over your right shoulder.

turns.cn: 离路边多远合适？
turns.en: How close should I be to the curb?

turns.cn: 十二英寸以内，车身平行。
turns.en: Within twelve inches, and parallel to the curb.

turns.cn: 这次好像歪了。
turns.en: I think I'm crooked this time.

turns.cn: 没关系，开出来再练一次。
turns.en: That's okay. Pull out and try again.

title: DMV Road Test
scene: 你在参加 DMV 路考。

turns.cn: 请出示练车许可和保险证明。
turns.en: Show me your learner's permit and proof of insurance.

turns.cn: 在这里。需要我演示灯光吗？
turns.en: Here you go. Do you need me to demonstrate the lights?

turns.cn: 不用，前方路口左转。
turns.en: No. Make a left at the intersection ahead.

turns.cn: 好的，先看镜子再打灯。
turns.en: Okay. Mirror, signal, then turn.

turns.cn: 限速二十五，注意学校区域。
turns.en: Speed limit twenty-five. School zone ahead.

turns.cn: 已减速。接下来做什么？
turns.en: I've slowed down. What's next?

turns.cn: 前面侧方停车。
turns.en: Parallel park up ahead.

title: Getting Pulled Over
scene: 警察拦下你的车，你配合检查。

turns.cn: 晚上好，知道为什么拦您吗？
turns.en: Good evening. Do you know why I pulled you over?

turns.cn: 不清楚，抱歉。
turns.en: I'm not sure. Sorry about that.

turns.cn: 尾灯坏了，请出示驾照和保险。
turns.en: Your tail light is out. License and insurance, please.

turns.cn: 给您，在手套箱里。
turns.en: Here they are. They're in the glove box.

turns.cn: 请留在车里，我查一下。
turns.en: Please stay in the vehicle. I'll be right back.

turns.cn: 好的，我会尽快修好灯。
turns.en: Okay. I'll get the light fixed as soon as possible.

turns.cn: 这次警告，修好再上路。
turns.en: This is a warning. Fix it before you drive again.

title: Buying a Used Car
scene: 你看了一辆二手车，和卖家谈条件。

turns.cn: 2018年的，八万英里，八千五百块。
turns.en: It's a 2018 with eighty thousand miles. Eighty-five hundred.

turns.cn: 能试驾吗？保养记录有吗？
turns.en: Can I test-drive it? Do you have service records?

turns.cn: 可以，记录在手套箱。
turns.en: Sure. Records are in the glove box.

turns.cn: 刹车有点响，能便宜五百吗？
turns.en: The brakes squeak a bit. Would you take five hundred off?

turns.cn: 最低八千，今天付现金。
turns.en: Eight thousand firm if you pay cash today.

turns.cn: 好，我明天带机械师再看一眼。
turns.en: Okay. I'll bring a mechanic to look at it tomorrow.

turns.cn: 没问题，下午两点可以吗？
turns.en: No problem. Does two PM work?

title: Parking Ticket
scene: 你收到停车罚单，去市政网站咨询申诉。

turns.cn: 交通违章窗口，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Parking violations desk. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我收到一张罚单，但当时咪表是付过费的。
turns.en: I got a ticket, but I had paid the meter.

turns.cn: 有付款收据或银行扣款记录吗？
turns.en: Do you have a receipt or bank charge record?

turns.cn: 有，手机App里的交易记录。
turns.en: Yes, the transaction history in the parking app.

turns.cn: 填申诉表，附上截图，十四个工作日内答复。
turns.en: Fill out an appeal form with screenshots. You'll hear back in fourteen business days.

turns.cn: 申诉期间要交罚款吗？
turns.en: Do I need to pay the fine while it's under review?

turns.cn: 可以先不交，批准后会撤销。
turns.en: You can wait. It'll be dismissed if approved.

title: Highway Merging
scene: 教练带你练习上高速并线。

turns.cn: 加速道要踩油门，匹配车流速度。
turns.en: Use the ramp to speed up and match traffic.

turns.cn: 后面有车很近，我还能并进去吗？
turns.en: A car is close behind. Can I still merge?

turns.cn: 看后视镜和盲点，打灯，找空隙。
turns.en: Check your mirror and blind spot, signal, and find a gap.

turns.cn: 好的，我减速让了一下。
turns.en: Okay. I slowed to let them pass.

turns.cn: 现在并线，保持车距。
turns.en: Merge now and keep your following distance.

turns.cn: 出口两英里，要换道了。
turns.en: My exit is two miles. I need to change lanes.

turns.cn: 提前打灯，别临时刹车。
turns.en: Signal early. Don't brake at the last second.

title: Passed the Road Test
scene: 你路考通过了，和教练分享好消息。

turns.cn: 我通过了！谢谢您这些周的指导。
turns.en: I passed! Thanks for all your help these weeks.

turns.cn: 恭喜！侧方停车那次很稳。
turns.en: Congratulations! Your parallel parking was solid.

turns.cn: 考官说我观察镜子做得好。
turns.en: The examiner said I checked my mirrors well.

turns.cn: 接下来去 DMV 换正式驾照。
turns.en: Next step is getting your full license at the DMV.

turns.cn: 晚上我请你吃饭庆祝。
turns.en: Dinner's on me tonight to celebrate.

turns.cn: 好意心领了，路上永远安全第一。
turns.en: That's kind of you. Always put safety first on the road.

turns.cn: 一定！再次感谢！
turns.en: I will. Thanks again!
